title: Canopy Growth (CGC) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
text: Analyst consensus shows Canopy Growth has a Moderate Buy rating based on 2 buy ratings, 2 hold ratings and 0 sell ratings. The 12-month average price target is $1.40, representing 22.72% upside potential. The average one-year price target is $1.81 with forecasts ranging from a low of $1.02 to a high of $3.80. Twelve analysts have analyzed CGC with an average price target of $1.75, implying a 54.5% price increase compared to current price of $1.1343. Benchmark upgraded Canopy Growth's hold rating on November 10, 2025. The stock is currently trading around $1.11-$1.14 USD with most analyst price targets suggesting moderate upside potential over next 12 months.
